original: A barrel with virtual storage. Items are saved to disk when closed, reducing server entity load.
english: A barrel with virtual storage. Items are saved to disk when closed, reducing server entity load.
spanish: Un barril con almacenamiento virtual. Los objetos se guardan en disco al cerrarlo, reduciendo la carga de entidades del servidor.
russian: Бочка с виртуальным хранилищем. Предметы сохраняются на диск при закрытии, снижая нагрузку на сервер.
chinesesimp: 具有虚拟存储功能的桶。关闭时物品会保存到磁盘，减少服务器实体负载。

original: A large barrel with virtual storage and increased capacity.
english: A large barrel with virtual storage and increased capacity.
spanish: Un barril grande con almacenamiento virtual y mayor capacidad.
russian: Большая бочка с виртуальным хранилищем и увеличенной ёмкостью.
chinesesimp: 具有虚拟存储功能和更大容量的大桶。

original: [VStorage] Container is being processed, please wait...
english: [VStorage] Container is being processed, please wait...
spanish: [VStorage] El contenedor se está procesando, espera...
chinesesimp: [VStorage] 容器正在处理中，请稍候...

original: Wait before using this container again.
english: Wait before using this container again.
spanish: Espera antes de usar este contenedor de nuevo.
chinesesimp: 请等待后再使用此容器。
